Video.summary: On a spectacular beach in Alanya, the MLO Strongman Champions League Turkey was viewed by thousands of spectators over a two day battle. With 12 athletes at the start over 6 cruel events, like Marble Stone Lift, Truckpull and Deadlift cars. And with the comeback of Travis Ortmayer / USA, former stone king and world ranked competitor. Winner of several SCL stages in the past.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 3, Turkey

Video.summary: With new places on the calendar, over 16 stages, broadcasting in over 100 countries and in its 13th year, the MLO Strongman Champions League (SCL) can be seen truly as the biggest strongman league in the world. The last stage over 2 episodes of the MLO Strongman Champions League, were held in Porto, Portugal. This competition in Portugal is full of memorable performances and strong results.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 15, World Finals (Part 1)

Video.summary: With new places on the calendar, over 16 stages, broadcasting in over 100 countries and in its 13th year, the MLO Strongman Champions League (SCL) can be seen truly as the biggest strongman league in the world. This competition in Portugal is full of memorable performances and strong results and this is the final!
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 16, World Finals (Part 2)

Video.summary: The spectacular Fefor Arena hosted for the 8th time the Worlds Strongest Viking, part of the SCL World Series. But with the absence of former title holders its anyones game. Again, a very spectacular episode of the Strongman Champions League here in Norway.
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 1, Norway

Video.summary: Were in sunny Finland for the next stage of a double-bill of SCL action, but this time its a team event. A truly fantastic event with 6000 spectators. Even during COVID times this was exceptional! 8 Strong Teams where fighting for the title over a crazy 9 events.
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 6, World Strongest Team 1

Image.alt: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 6, World Strongest Team 1
SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 6, World Strongest Team 1
SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 6, World Strongest Team 1

Video.summary: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland, done over 9 cruel events. In this episode the last and final 5 events take place. 8 Strong Teams are fighting for the title.
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 7, World Strongest Team 2

Image.alt: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 7, World Strongest Team 2
SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 7, World Strongest Team 2
SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 7, World Strongest Team 2

Video.summary: Four times Strongest Man of Holland, Alex Moonen and the “Flying Dutchman” Kelvin de Ruiter competing here in Holland against 12 other strongest men in the world. There were 6 events in total, and 3 in this episode: The first event, a truckpull of 17.000 kg over 25 meters in max 75 seconds, was a real hard pull Also for the World Champion Truckpull, Holland’s runner-up Kelvin de Ruiter, but watch his amazing technique here.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 4, Holland (Part 1)

Video.summary: Strongest Man of Holland, Alex Moonen and the “Flying Dutchman” Kelvin de Ruiter, competing in Holland against 12 other strongest men in the world. There were 6 events in total, 3 in this second episode; a Viking-press of 150 kg with the current world record holder Luke Herrick. The fifth event, a front hold of 25 kg is loved or hated by the athletes and lastly, the Stones of Strength.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 5, Holland (Part 2)

Video.summary: An unbelievable TANK PULL of 50.000 kg was at the stage of SCL RUSSIA. Never seen this before! Not only a tank pull was done here but also the Viking Press/ Deadlift Max and Log lift reps were spectacular events to see here in Russia. With Mikhail Koklyaev also as event presenter, the former top 3 world strongest man from Russia was there
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 6, Russia

Video.summary: In this year’s edition on The Balkan Peninsula, we have competing the new talent from Estonia Marko Remlik together with Sebastian Kurek from Poland and yellow leader Kelvin de Ruiter
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 7, Serbia

Video.summary: Kelvin de Ruiter is here to defend his SCL World Truck Pull Championships title. But this year, another strong field wants his title. Over 3 different pulls with 3 different trucks, and 14 athletes at the start, it will be difficult for everybody.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 12, Ukraine

Video.summary: The next set of challenges are set in sunny Esposende in Portugal. With stars such as Travis Ortmayer, Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland, and Ervin Toots from Estonia. While Fabio Silva will defend the honour in his own country.
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 8, Portugal

Video.summary: We are back in Germany, with the world record breakers. We promise you this is going to be amazing. Do not move from that seat, because we are going to see some records smashed today. Over 6 cruel events, you will see who gets crowned of the King Of The Castle!
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 9, World Records (Part 1)

Video.summary: With the next episode of Strongman Champions League Germany. Its the world record breakers, and in the last show we set two new records. Can more be records be broken before the king of the castle is crowned?
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 10, World Records (Part 2)

Video.summary: In this episode, the Titan, former double World champion from Latvia will compete against his fellow countryman and the current World champion - Aivars Smaukstelis. With 8 events over 2 stages the contestants are pushed to their limits in Finland.
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 2, Finland (Part 1)

Video.summary: Dainis Zageris and Aivars Smaukstelis, both from Latvia have a serious, strong battle in the this second and final episode of the SCL Finland 2020. Watch the unbelievable and brute power of these athletes in the last 4 events to crown the winner.
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 3, Finland (Part 2)

Video.summary: The SCL Germany event takes place in an ancient castle called Die Burg in the heart of Germany. Its here where 5 world record attempts take place across 5 different events with 10 athletes. They will go to the max! See this and much more in the SCL Germany 2020.
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 4, World Record Breakers

Image.alt: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 4, World Record Breakers
SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 4, World Record Breakers
SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 4, World Record Breakers

Video.summary: SCL Norway is normally all about snow, wind, and cold weather. Our brave athletes are used to compete under conditions few other athletes have competed in, but after COVID delays the competition has been moved from winter to summer bringing in a whole new range of challenges. With an impressive athlete list who will be the winner across 5 cruel events?
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 5, Strongest Viking

Video.summary: Strongman Champions League: World Record Breakers 2024 kicks off with the Truck Pull, followed by the Front Hold, Frame Carry, Tractor Pull, Shield Carry, Sandbag Toss, and concludes with the intense Loading Race. This two-day competition features all the top strongmen from Finland-and it's one for the history books. Three new world records are shattered, making this a must-see episode for...
Video.title: Stage 7 - FINLAND - 2024 - World record breakers

Video.summary: Mateusz Kieliszkowski from Poland and Aivars Smaukstelis from Latvia are the strongman future of these days. Mateusz is the best man in the World at the moment to defeat. Only 25 years and such a fantastic strongman. They come here only for a win. But there are 12 more Strong athletes in this episode who want the title of Finland as well.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 8, Finland (Part 1)

Video.summary: Mateusz Is leading after day 1 (previous episode) with close behind him Aivars Smaukstelis and Zake Muluzi from the UK. All very exciting! 5 events in this episode: Log Lift, Fram Walk, Deadlift, Sack Throw (Weight for Height), Loading medley.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 9, Finland (Part 2)

Video.summary: In this stage we have a new strong debutant: Oleg Sylka from the Ukraine. He is the new talent, who will stand up against the old champions like ZSydrunas Savickas and Brian Shaw and the Stoltman Brother from the UK. This new talent Oleg is a great character and we will see him flame in the episode in Portugal.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 10, Portugal

Video.summary: In Callio is the deepest mine of Europe/ 1500 meter deep, whereas the MLO Strongman Champions League also did 1 event. The Forward Hold, on a 1500 dept/ also a kind of new record/ as it was never done before. Spectacular and new in Strongman sport.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 11, Callio

Video.summary: SCL edition Curacao 2019 was a great event, twelve power boys from all over made a great show at the white beaches, and 35 degrees Celsius heat in the Carrabean Islands. Two events were held on Friday at the beach of beautiful resort Sunscape, the other three were held near the world famous floating bridge at Willemstad on Saturday night.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 13, Caribbean

Video.summary: Hosted at Meydan Grandstand in Dubai, the Strongman Champions League had some really big names in the list like Mateusz Kieliszkowski from Poland, Brian Shaw from the USA and Krzysztof Radzikowski. In front of the Burj Khalifa the athletes do the deadlift max and 4 other heavy events at another spot in Dubai.
Video.title: SCL 2019 Season 6, Episode 14, Dubai

Video.summary: Welcome to Kokkola in Finland. This city will be the setting for the Lightweight World championship. Out of 24 athletes, only 16 will make it through to the final day, but who will champion each event and who is going to be eliminated?
Video.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 11, Worlds 105 Kg (Part 1)
